changeSet.author: root
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE service_order ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), service_time TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, car_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES car(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, client_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES client(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, station_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES station(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, service_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES service(id) ON DELETE RESTRICT, created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW() )
